case_title: TIMOTHY K. WILLIAMS et al VS. FIRST AMERICAN HOME WARRANTY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $650.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS, TIMOTHY K. ASSAD, MICHAEL J. AS TO DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN HOME WARRANTY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-02-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF BY FAX. THE FEE FOR THIS SERVICE WAS $69.50 SERVED JUN-17-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, TIMOTHY K. ASSAD, MICHAEL J.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN HOME WARRANTY
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-02-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-02-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-02-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, TIMOTHY K. ASSAD, MICHAEL J. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN HOME WARRANTY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
